narration: Bats don’t see the night; they hear it.
visual_description: Hook visual: Bats don’t see the night; they hear it.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Bats don’t see the night; they hear it.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Bats don’t see the night; they hear it.

narration: Using echolocation, bats emit high-frequency calls and listen for echoes.
visual_description: Context visual: Using echolocation, bats emit high-frequency calls and listen for echoes.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Using echolocation, bats emit high-frequency calls and listen for echoes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Using echolocation, bats emit high-frequency calls and listen for echoes.

narration: These echoes reveal the size, shape, and distance of objects, painting a sonic picture.
visual_description: Escalation visual: These echoes reveal the size, shape, and distance of objects, painting a sonic picture.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: These echoes reveal the size, shape, and distance of objects, painting a sonic picture.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: These echoes reveal the size, shape, and distance of objects, painting a sonic picture.

narration: Research shows bats can distinguish between different objects just by their sound.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Research shows bats can distinguish between different objects just by their sound.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Research shows bats can distinguish between different objects just by their sound.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Research shows bats can distinguish between different objects just by their sound.

narration: Their world is a symphony of sounds, allowing them to thrive in complete darkness.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Their world is a symphony of sounds, allowing them to thrive in complete darkness.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Their world is a symphony of sounds, allowing them to thrive in complete darkness.
